title: Unzipping and Extracting Data
scenario: Given a zipped file containing a CSV file, unzip it and extract the CSV data into a pandas DataFrame. The target output should be a Markdown table representing the DataFrame. Constraints: Must handle file compression, must use a library like pandas for data manipulation.
constraints: Must use a library like pandas for data manipulation

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated code adhere to the constraints?
Is the generated Markdown syntax valid?
Is the generated code efficient in terms of time complexity?
